page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Frogs is a workflow designed to produce an otus count matrix from high depth sequencing amplicon data. this is the official release 3.1.0 of frogs.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: The user-friendly and Galaxy-supported pipeline FROGS analyses large sets of DNA amplicons sequences accurately and rapidly, essential for microbe community studies.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The user-friendly and Galaxy-supported pipeline FROGS analyses large sets of DNA amplicons sequences accurately and rapidly, essential for microbe community studies.
